   "reasoning": "I'm scared that if the school doesn't get more money, I'll have to drop out and work on the farm like my parents. That's why I think funding boosts and student scholarships are crucial - they'll help my family and me stay in school. I also want to see more counselors and teachers who care, but I don't trust those transparency reports that seem to be for adults, not students like me.",

}
